ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament the player participates in */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the player participates in */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the team */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "tournament_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the tournament */,
  "tournament_format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "season_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the season */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "innings" INTEGER /* Number of innings played */,
  "not_out" INTEGER /* Number of times not out */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "high_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved */,
  "average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Total balls faced */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate */,
  "centuries" INTEGER /* Number of centuries scored */,
  "fifties" INTEGER /* Number of fifties scored */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit */,
  "ducks" INTEGER /* Number of ducks */,
  "fifty_plus" INTEGER /* Number of fifty plus scores */,
  "maiden_overs" INTEGER /* Number of maiden overs */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament the match belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the match belongs to */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first team playing the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second team playing the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "match_winner" TEXT /* Winner of the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player match statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored in the match */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Balls faced in the match */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Fours hit in the match */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Sixes hit in the match */,
  "is_not_out" INTEGER /* Whether the player remained not out */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the player */,
  "catches_taken" INTEGER /* Catches taken by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the access event */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
